name: InsForge
description: Backend platform built for AI agents to build and ship fullstack applications. Provides authentication, database, storage, functions, and AI integrations in seconds. Open source with 2.3K+ GitHub stars. Helps turn coding agents into full-stack engineers.
community_quotes: Turn your coding agent into full-stack engineer
Backend still slows down development even with AI coding agents - InsForge solves this gap

name: Firecrawl CLI
description: An all-in-one CLI toolkit for scraping, searching, and browsing the web, specifically built for AI agents and developers. Provides clean, reliable data with a Browser Sandbox feature. Compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode.
community_quotes: The complete web data toolkit for AI agents

name: CodeYam CLI & Memory
description: Comprehensive memory management for Claude Code. Uses a background agent to review coding session transcripts, identifies confusion patterns, and generates targeted rules to improve coding efficiency. Runs locally without registration.
community_quotes: Comprehensive memory management for Claude Code
Claude Code kept repeating the same mistakes - this tool solves that

name: Spine Swarm
description: Manages a team of AI agents that do real work together. Coordinates multiple AI coding agents for complex tasks.

name: Unblocked
description: Gets AI agents to generate code that fits your system architecture and constraints.

name: Agent Skills
description: Finds and integrates skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and other AI coding tools. Part of the emerging Agent Skills open standard that allows AI coding assistants to perform agentic tasks.
community_quotes: Agent skills follow an open standard across Claude Code, Cursor, and Copilot

name: Claude Marketplace
description: Helps companies easily discover and acquire the AI tools they need for development workflows. Streamlines procurement of AI development tools.

name: Superset
description: Runs an army of Claude Code, Codex, and other AI coding agents on your machine simultaneously. Enables parallel execution of multiple AI coding agents.

name: memories.sh
description: One layer for memories, skills, and rules across any AI agent. Provides unified memory management for multiple AI coding agents, addressing the challenge of context persistence across sessions.
